hero.subtitle: We are a new company from Split offering fast and reliable moving, furniture delivery, and parcel transport services.
hero.bullet3: Fair prices with no hidden costs

services.title: What we can do for you
services.subtitle: Moving, delivery, and transport — all by arrangement, no complications.

moving.title: Moving
moving.description: Moving apartments, houses, and smaller business premises. We help with loading and unloading and take care of the safety of your belongings.

furniture.title: Furniture Delivery
furniture.description: Pickup from the store or warehouse and delivery to your address. By arrangement, we can bring items inside your apartment or house.

parcels.title: Parcel Transport
parcels.description: Fast transport of packages, goods, and equipment within the city and surrounding area.

other.title: Other
other.description: Transport of beverages, building materials, and similar items by arrangement.

trust.aboutText1: We are a new company specialised in moving and transport. Our focus is on simple arrangements, arriving on time, and careful handling of your belongings.
trust.aboutText2: Although we are just starting out, we carry out every job with maximum professionalism because our goal is long-term client satisfaction.
trust.whySubtitle: Simple arrangements, transparent prices, and careful handling — that is our way of working.

fast.title: Fast & simple arrangements
fast.description: Contact us, we agree on a time, and we arrive on schedule.

flexible.title: Flexible scheduling
flexible.description: We work 7 days a week and adapt to your timetable.

fair.title: Fair prices
fair.description: No hidden costs — the price is what we agree on.

careful.title: Careful handling
careful.description: We treat every item with care as if it were our own.

individual.title: Individual approach
individual.description: Every job is different — we adapt to your needs.

contact.badge: We respond within 30 minutes during business hours
contact.title: Need moving or transport?
contact.subtitle: Get in touch for a quote — we respond quickly.
contact.whatsappDesc: Fastest response. Send us a message and get a quote in minutes.
contact.phoneDesc: Talk directly with our team for quick assistance and a free estimate.
contact.toastDesc: We will get back to you as soon as possible.

footer.desc: Professional furniture transport and moving services. Focus on simple arrangements and careful handling.
